compiled_intent:
Objective: Build a governed SRX ACE workflow for sales offer generation that integrates compliance lens validation, handles multi-runtime confusion chaos input, and produces a compilable artifact with explicit validation gates.
Scope:
- The workflow must accept a sales offer request with potentially missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. It must apply compliance lens rules, validate against SR8 governance standards, and output a structured artifact with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract sections.
Constraints:
- Must use compliance_lens as the primary validation mechanism.
- Must handle multi_runtime_confusion chaos input type.
- All validation gates must be explicit and auditable.
- Output must be SR8-compilable with all required sections.
- Must operate within United States legal and regulatory framework.
- No hallucinated or fabricated compliance rules; only use known standards.
Success Criteria:
- Workflow processes chaotic input without failure.
- Compliance lens correctly identifies and flags missing or ambiguous elements.
- Validation gates produce clear pass/fail outcomes.
- Final artifact contains all SR8-required sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.
- Artifact can be directly compiled by SR8 compiler.
Output Contract:
- artifact_type: srx_ace_workflow
- depth_tier: D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE
- runtime_target: Codex
- sections: objective: string; scope: string; constraints: array of strings; success_criteria: array of strings; output_contract: object with artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, sections
- validation_gates: gate_id: GATE-001; name: Input Sanity Check; description: Verify input is not empty and contains at minimum a request identifier.; pass_condition: input.request_id exists and is non-empty; gate_id: GATE-002; name: Compliance Lens Activation; description: Ensure compliance_lens is applied and all regulatory fields are present.; pass_condition: compliance_lens.active == true and all required regulatory fields are non-null; gate_id: GATE-003; name: Chaos Input Resolution; description: Resolve multi_runtime_confusion by normalizing runtime targets and deduplicating conflicting directives.; pass_condition: no unresolved runtime conflicts remain; gate_id: GATE-004; name: SR8 Section Completeness; description: Confirm all five SR8-required sections are present and non-empty.; pass_condition: objective, scope, constraints, success_criteria, output_contract all present and non-empty

Constraints: Must use compliance_lens as the primary validation mechanism.
Must handle multi_runtime_confusion chaos input type.
All validation gates must be explicit and auditable.
Output must be SR8-compilable with all required sections.
Must operate within United States legal and regulatory framework.
No hallucinated or fabricated compliance rules; only use known standards.
compiled_intent.Objective: Build a governed SRX ACE workflow for sales offer generation that integrates compliance lens validation, handles multi-runtime confusion chaos input, and produces a compilable artifact with explicit validation gates.

sections.output_contract: object with artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, sections

validation_gates.description: Verify input is not empty and contains at minimum a request identifier.
validation_gates.name: Input Sanity Check

validation_gates.description: Ensure compliance_lens is applied and all regulatory fields are present.
validation_gates.name: Compliance Lens Activation
validation_gates.pass_condition: compliance_lens.active == true and all required regulatory fields are non-null

validation_gates.description: Resolve multi_runtime_confusion by normalizing runtime targets and deduplicating conflicting directives.
validation_gates.name: Chaos Input Resolution

validation_gates.description: Confirm all five SR8-required sections are present and non-empty.
validation_gates.name: SR8 Section Completeness
validation_gates.pass_condition: objective, scope, constraints, success_criteria, output_contract all present and non-empty

It must apply compliance lens rules, validate against SR8 governance standards, and output a structured artifact with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract sections.
Success Criteria: Workflow processes chaotic input without failure.

Final artifact contains all SR8-required sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.
